column1: # QMK <-> ZMK equivalence map. Two kinds of rows:
#   atom   - a bare keycode (QMK form is KC_-stripped) that spells differently
#            in ZMK. Identity atoms (A-Z, F1-F12, MINUS, SPACE, ...) and digits
#            (KC_1 <-> N1) are handled by rule and need no row here.
#   token  - a full-token semantic equivalence for custom/behavior keycodes
# Edit this file as the layout grows; unmapped tokens surface as UNMAPPED.
